text: Launched the Chicago Healthcare Accessibility Dashboard (v1) — an interactive map of 839 healthcare facilities, 33 community health indicators, and multi-level geographic boundaries across Chicago. Optimization module coming next.
Awarded the SoReMo Research Fellowship for work on FalCom — a sampling method for districting and hierarchical facility location.
Paper accepted at Graphs and Combinatorics: Coloring of graphs avoiding bicolored paths of a fixed length.
Research internship at Fermi National Accelerator Laboratory, working on the Exa.TrkX project for particle trajectory reconstruction.
Joined the Discrete Applied Mathematics Group at Illinois Institute of Technology.
